name: canshare-tnm-neuroendocrine-gi-pm
title: NZ AJCC neuroendocrine gastrointestinal pathological M category
description: A pathological distant metastasis stage (pM) of a neuroendocrine gastrointestional tumour before initiation of treatment, using the AJCC cancer staging manual (latest edition).
